summary: Iteration 13 verification complete. All four review items verified successfully: (A) /core-mission renders with title 'Mitigate the digital — and now the AI — divide.', all six required keywords (Perplexity, Claude 4.6, ChatGPT 5.4, bandwidth, Introduction to AI, Advanced HTML) present, Continue button visible with testID core-mission-continue-btn, and NO auto-redirect after 5+ seconds. (B) /core-mission?revisit=1 renders the button label as 'Back' instead of 'Continue'. (C) /programme Overview shows the new 'DESIGN PRINCIPLES' sub-label above the chip row, with clear whitespace and a horizontal hairline divider separating the last chip ('Mobile-friendly offline single-file tools') from the italic philosophy paragraph — they no longer visually merge. (D) Backend regression: /api/income/modules returns 200 with count=17 (modules array contains 18 cards due to intentional Task 18=Task 2 duplication documented in the response); /api/programme returns 200 with overview.design_principles non-empty (5 entries); /healthz returns HTTP 200 (note: at the public URL this is served by the frontend SPA shell since ingress only routes /api/* to backend — backend's own /healthz is still mounted at server level). (E) grep confirmed both 'account-core-mission-btn' (line 214) and 'account-mission-btn' (line 227) testIDs present in app/(tabs)/account.tsx.

minor.issue: Public /healthz returns the Expo web HTML (200) rather than backend JSON, because Kubernetes ingress only forwards /api/* to backend. Functionally 200, but not a true backend probe via public URL. /api/healthz returns 404 (no such route).

critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx awaits BOTH AsyncStorage reads before any Redirect renders — confirmed no flash of /mission for first-time users; gating shows splash spinner until both flags resolved.
core-mission.tsx correctly skips storage.setItem when revisit=1, so revisiting from Account does not flip the first-time flag.

programme.tsx Overview now wraps design-principles in a labelled sub-section (Design principles label + tagRow with marginBottom:12) and philosophy is wrapped in a View with borderTopWidth:1 + paddingTop:10 — visually separated as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 acceptance is green. Tested at https://token-limit-enforcer.preview.emergentagent.com using mobile viewport 390x844. Key public endpoints: /api/income/modules (count=17, 18 cards w/ intentional dup), /api/programme (overview.design_principles 5 items, philosophy ~215 chars). /healthz hits frontend at the ingress level — use /api/* for real backend probes.
rca_of_issue: Not applicable — verification iteration, no bugs found.
